series_metadata.series_description: The Catastrophic Cost program is used by traditional school districts, community schools and joint vocational schools to submit reimbursement requests for costs exceeding the threshold to educated K-12 students with disabilities in Categories 2-6. This reimbursement is available to the financially responsible district.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: , provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: , provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
